testimonials.label: Testimonials
testimonials.desc: There are many variations of passages of available but the majority have suffered alteration in some form by injected humor or random word which don't look even.

1.text: There are many variations of passages of available but the majority have suffered alteration in some form by injected humor or random word which don't look even.

2.text: KrushiKranti has completely changed how I sell my produce. I get better prices and faster payments than ever before. Highly recommended for every Indian farmer.

3.text: As a wholesaler, the bulk ordering process here is seamless. Quality reports and direct farmer communication make it my go-to platform.

1.q: How does KrushiKranti connect farmers and buyers?
1.a: KrushiKranti enables direct trade between farmers, consumers, and wholesalers. Farmers list products with real-time pricing, and buyers can place retail or bulk orders without middlemen.

2.q: Are product prices and quality details transparent?
2.a: Yes. Every listing includes pricing, quantity, unit, farmer details, and availability. Buyers can review product information before checkout, and farmers can manage stock directly from their dashboard.

3.q: Can wholesalers place bulk orders and negotiate pricing?
3.a: Absolutely. Wholesalers can send bulk purchase requests, negotiate with farmers, and track request status in one place. This helps both sides agree on fair prices and delivery plans quickly.

footer.tagline: Connecting farmers directly with consumers. Fresh produce, fair prices.

about.label: About Us
about.hero_tagline: Revolutionizing the agricultural supply chain with transparency and technology.
about.description: KrushiKranti is a modern agricultural marketplace that connects farmers, wholesalers, and consumers to create a transparent, fair, and efficient ecosystem for fresh produce across India.
about.mission_desc: To bridge the gap between farmers and buyers through technology.
about.history_desc: Founded in 2022 to revolutionize the agriculture supply chain.
about.value_desc_transparency: We ensure every transaction is clear and fair for all parties involved.
about.value_desc_impact: By removing middlemen, we put more money directly into the hands of farmers.
about.value_desc_innovation: Using modern technology to solve age-old agricultural challenges.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.body: Empower farmers with fair pricing, market data, and direct access to buyers — removing middlemen and maximising farmer income.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.body: A sustainable agricultural supply chain where technology bridges the gap between rural producers and urban demand.

offers.title: What We Offer
offers.body: Transparent pricing, bulk order management, farmer dashboards, and simple tools for inventory, logistics, and real-time analytics.

story.para1: KrushiKranti was born out of a simple observation — farmers selling tomatoes at ₹5/kg while consumers bought them at ₹60/kg. The gap was not demand — it was the broken supply chain in between.
story.para2: We built a platform that gives farmers a storefront, gives wholesalers bulk ordering tools, and gives consumers a direct line to fresh, certified produce — with full price transparency at every step.

history.desc: Agricultural heritage is the root of our civilization. For over a century, we have been committed to advancing farming techniques and supporting rural communities.

agriculture.title: Agriculture Products
agriculture.desc: Fresh farm produce sourced directly from verified farmers across India, quality-assured at every step of the journey.

organic.title: Organic Products
organic.desc: Naturally grown, chemical-free produce cultivated using sustainable farming practices for a healthier tomorrow.

dairy.title: Dairy Products
dairy.desc: Pure and fresh dairy products direct from local farms, delivered to your doorstep with full hygiene standards.

why_choose.subtitle: Our Farm Benefits
why_choose.title: Why Choose KrushiKranti
why_choose.desc: We directly connect farmers with buyers, ensuring fair prices, fresh produce, and a transparent supply chain that benefits everyone in the agricultural ecosystem.
why_choose.benefit1_desc: Every product on our platform meets the highest organic quality standards before reaching your table.
why_choose.benefit2_desc: Our verified network of professional farmers guarantees expertise, care, and dedication to quality.
why_choose.benefit3_desc: From farm to table, every product is quality-tested and certified to ensure your safety and satisfaction.

contact.label: Contact

contact.subtitle: Have a question, partnership inquiry, or need support? Our team responds within one business day.
contact.success_message: Message sent! We'll get back to you within 24 hours.

blog.label: Our Blog
blog.hero_tagline: Cultivating knowledge for a sustainable agricultural future

1.title: Bringing Food Production Back to Cities
1.excerpt: Agricultural output is influenced by many factors. One of them is soil quality. Healthy soil is the foundation of a productive farming system.
1.author: Kevin Martin
1.content_body: Vertical farming allows us to grow more food in less space. By stacking layers of crops, we can maximize yield per square foot. This innovation is key to urban food security.
1.quote: The future of agriculture is not just in the fields, but also on the rooftops and in the vertical farms of our concrete jungles.

2.title: The Future of Farming, Smart Irrigation Solutions
2.excerpt: Modern urban farming isn’t just a fad; it’s a necessity. As cities grow, the distance between the farm and the table increases.
2.author: Kevin Martin
2.content_body: Smart irrigation systems use sensors to deliver exactly the amount of water a plant needs. This saves water and improves crop health significantly.
2.quote: Water is a precious resource. Our technology ensures every drop counts towards a sustainable harvest.

3.title: Relationship of Chemistry and Other Sciences
3.excerpt: Vertical farming allows us to grow more food in less space. By stacking layers of crops, we can increase yield per square foot.
3.author: Kevin Martin
3.content_body: Understanding the chemical composition of soil and nutrients helps farmers choose the best inputs for their crops, leading to higher quality produce.
3.quote: Science and nature go hand in hand to create the perfect environment for growth.
